product_overview: Respect App is a social media application for sharing posts, engaging with content, and connecting with other users through profiles, search, messaging, and notifications. It also includes moderation and admin tools for reviewing reports and managing inappropriate content.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in to access the app
Browse a social feed of posts and stories
Create and share text, image, video, or voice posts
Interact with posts through likes, comments, replies, reposts, and saving
View and edit user profiles and follow other users
Review notifications and navigate to related content
Report inappropriate content for moderation review

features.name: User Login
features.description: Users can sign in to access their account with email or username and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in username or email -> Fill in password -> Submit the login form -> See the home area
Navigate to /login -> Switch to create account mode -> Return to login mode

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Users can create a new account with profile and account details.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Switch to create account mode -> Fill in username, profile name, email, birth date, password, and confirm password -> Accept the terms -> Submit the registration form -> See the authenticated app
Navigate to /login -> Switch to create account mode -> Fill in invalid or incomplete account details -> Submit the registration form -> See validation errors

features.name: Social Feed
features.description: Users can browse posts and stories, create new posts, and interact with content in the feed.
user_flows: Navigate to /feed -> Scroll through posts -> Like a post -> Repost a post -> Save a post -> Open comments and reply to a post -> View full-screen media or stories
Navigate to /feed -> Create a new text, image, video, or voice post -> Return to the feed and see the new post
Navigate to /feed -> Report an inappropriate post -> Return to the feed after submitting the report

features.name: Search
features.description: Users can search for people and posts across the platform and open results.
user_flows: Navigate to /search -> Enter a search query -> View matching user and post results -> Open a profile or post from the results

features.name: Profile
features.description: Users can view profiles, follow or unfollow other users, and edit their own profile information.
user_flows: Navigate to /profile -> View avatar, cover image, bio, and posts -> Follow a user -> Unfollow the same user
Navigate to /profile -> Edit own profile information -> Save the changes -> See updated profile details

features.name: Private Chat
features.description: Users can view conversations and send direct messages to other users.
user_flows: Navigate to /chat -> Open the conversation list -> Select a conversation -> Type a message -> Send the message -> See the new message in the thread

features.name: Notifications
features.description: Users can review notifications and jump to the related content from each alert.
user_flows: Navigate to /notifications -> View the notification list -> Open a notification -> See the related post, reply, mention, or message thread
Navigate to /notifications -> Mark notifications as read -> See the unread state clear

features.name: Settings
features.description: Users can change appearance preferences and manage account options from settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> Toggle between dark and light theme -> Return to the app with the updated appearance
Navigate to /settings -> Open account and privacy options -> Log out of the app -> Return to the login screen

features.name: Admin Moderation
features.description: Authorized users can review reports and take moderation actions on content.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> Review pending reports -> Accept a moderation action -> Review the updated moderation queue
Navigate to /admin -> Review pending reports -> Reject a moderation action -> Return to the reports list

features.name: Home Navigation
features.description: Users can move between major app sections from the main app shell.
user_flows: Navigate to /home -> Open the navigation drawer -> Go to feed, streamers, messages, notifications, profile, settings, saved posts, live, or painters

routes.description: Splash screen and auth gate that routes to login or home
Login and registration screen with email/password and Google sign-in
Main shell with drawer navigation to feed, streamers, chat, notifications, profile, settings, admin, saved posts, live streams, and painters
Social feed with posts, stories, likes, comments, reposts, and media
User profile with avatar, bio, follow, and posts
In-app notifications for likes, replies, mentions, and reports
App settings including theme and account options
Admin moderation tools for reports and content review

features.name: User Login
features.description: Sign in with username or email and password
user_interactions: Fill username or email input field
See error message on invalid credentials or banned account
Toggle between login and create account modes

features.name: User Registration
features.description: Create a new account with username, email, password, name, and birth date
user_interactions: Fill username, profile name, email, birth date, password, and confirm password
See validation errors for invalid fields

features.name: Google Sign-In
features.description: Authenticate using Google OAuth via Supabase

features.name: Home Navigation
features.description: Navigate between main app sections from the home drawer and bottom areas
user_interactions: Tap feed, streamers, messages, notifications, profile, settings, saved posts, live, or painters
View unread badge counts on messages and notifications

features.name: Social Feed
features.description: Browse posts, stories, and interact with content
user_interactions: Like, repost, share, or save a post
Open comments and reply to posts
Create a new text, image, video, or voice post

features.name: Search
features.description: Search for users and posts across the platform
user_interactions: Open a profile or post from results

api_calls.endpoint: Supabase search queries and Respect AI search expand backend

features.name: Notifications
features.description: View and act on app notifications
user_interactions: Tap a notification to navigate to related content

features.name: Profile
features.description: View and edit user profile information
user_interactions: View avatar, cover, bio, and posts

features.name: Private Chat
features.description: Send and receive direct messages

features.name: Settings
features.description: Manage app preferences and account settings

features.name: Admin Moderation
features.description: Review reports and moderate content for admin users

known_limitations.issue: Flutter web build runs in dev mode; camera, WebRTC, push notifications, and some mobile plugins may not work on web
known_limitations.impact: Live streaming, voice recording, and native push features cannot be fully tested in browser

known_limitations.issue: Google Sign-In OAuth popup flow may be blocked or unreliable in automated browser testing
known_limitations.impact: Google login tests may fail unless using email/password credentials

known_limitations.issue: Admin panel visibility depends on account role stored in Supabase
known_limitations.impact: Admin tests only work with admin credentials such as configured test user

known_limitations.issue: Device ban check runs on startup and can block access for banned devices
known_limitations.impact: Tests may show blocked device screen instead of login on restricted environments
